title: Record: PR #1855 base + activation-aware GPTQ mixed precision - val_bpb 1.06081 (3-seed mean)
author: romeerp

data.description: Activation-aware GPTQ calibration using per-input-channel activation RMS and AWQ-style saliency scoring to choose a salient column group for higher-precision quantization.
Step-matched evaluation with FORCE_STOP_STEP to compare against PR #1855 at identical seed/step counts.

novel_contributions: AWQ-style saliency scoring using activation RMS and weight magnitude
Quantizing one salient 64-column group at int8 inside the GPTQ solve
Keeping stock PR #1855 LQER on top of the AWQ-aware GPTQ base
Step-matched 3-seed comparison against PR #1855 using identical stop steps
